title: Add UTC info to Map Settings and local time display under UTC Offset Selection

requirements.text: In the WebsiteLayoutPanel component, add a UTC info display under the 'Map Settings' section that shows the currently selected UTC offset in the same format as the local time display (e.g., 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45')

quotes: Under the Map Settings of the Website layout, add also the corresponding UTC info

acceptanceCriteria: UTC info appears under the Map Settings section in WebsiteLayoutPanel
Format matches the local time display format used elsewhere
Updates dynamically when UTC offset changes

requirements.text: In the LocationMapExplorer page, add a local time display directly under the 'UTC Offset Selection' button that uses the same format as shown under Map Settings (showing UTC offset and time like 'UTC+08:00: 14:30:45')

quotes: Under the UTC Offset Selection button, add the local time with format same as the one under Map settings

acceptanceCriteria: Local time display appears directly beneath the UTC Offset Selection button
Format is identical to the time display in Map Settings
Time updates in real-time based on selected UTC offset
Display is positioned within the XPath element /html[1]/body[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]

constraints: Do not modify the current UI layout structure
Do not change the 3D globe component or its behavior
Only modify elements related to requirements 1 and 2
Preserve all existing functionality in WebsiteLayoutPanel and LocationMapExplorer
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond the two specified time displays
Altering existing Map Settings or UTC Offset Selection button functionality
